BSF.name: UNHCR India
BSF.description: The UN Refugee Agency has operated in India since 1981. Handles refugee status determination, protection, and durable solutions. India's primary international humanitarian coordination body for refugee affairs.

BSF.name: Bengal Refugee Support Network
BSF.description: A registered NGO operating along the West Bengal and Assam borders. Provides legal documentation assistance, emergency shelter, and family tracing services for refugees arriving via the Bangladesh border.

BSF.name: Punjab Border Aid Initiative
BSF.description: Specialises in trauma counseling and rehabilitation for refugees and displaced persons at the Pakistan border. Partners with district hospitals for mental health support and runs a transitional housing program.

ITBP.name: UNHCR India
ITBP.description: The UN Refugee Agency has operated in India since 1981. Handles refugee status determination, protection, and durable solutions.

ITBP.name: Himalayan Relief Foundation
ITBP.description: Specialised in high-altitude humanitarian response and support for Tibetan refugees in Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, and Ladakh. Provides cold-weather shelter, medical first response, and documentation support.

SSB.name: UNHCR India
SSB.description: The UN Refugee Agency has operated in India since 1981.

SSB.name: Don Bosco India
SSB.description: A national faith-based humanitarian organisation with extensive operations in Northeast India. Runs education centres, vocational training, and skill development programs for refugees and displaced youth.

SSB.name: Terai Humanitarian Society
SSB.description: Focused on Nepal-origin migrant workers, stateless persons, and families requiring temporary shelter and repatriation support along the Bihar and Uttar Pradesh border belt.

Assam Rifles.name: UNHCR India
Assam Rifles.description: The UN Refugee Agency has operated in India since 1981.

Assam Rifles.name: Don Bosco India
Assam Rifles.description: A national faith-based humanitarian organisation with extensive operations in Northeast India.

Assam Rifles.name: Northeast Refugee Aid Collective
Assam Rifles.description: A multi-ethnic consortium of civil society organisations in Mizoram, Manipur, and Nagaland. Primary focus: Myanmar refugee intake — medical screening, emergency food, trauma support, and long-term camp management.

Assam Rifles.name: Mizoram Christian Service
Assam Rifles.description: A community-based organisation rooted in the Mizo church network. Provides food, emergency shelter, and basic education to Myanmar refugee families in Zokhawthar and Champhai.

CISF.name: UNHCR India
CISF.description: The UN Refugee Agency has operated in India since 1981.

CISF.name: Refugees International India
CISF.description: Focuses on policy advocacy and direct assistance for urban refugees in Delhi, Mumbai, and Chennai. Specialises in airport asylum procedure, legal representation, and connecting air-arrival asylum seekers with the NGO network.

CISF.name: Airport Humanitarian Services India
CISF.description: Specialised exclusively in the airport humanitarian corridor. Provides immediate relief — language interpretation, food, temporary holding assistance, and medical first assessment for asylum seekers at Indian international airports.
